canonical_lifecycle_note: V1 local-deterministic model. External runtime lifecycle (/session → /continuity → /authority → /compile) is SEQUENCED for post-V1. governed_files_hash provides repo-verifiable content binding. Owner workflow_dispatch provides explicit authorization.
intent: Add demo-freshness CI workflow (PR #1980): runs npm run demo and npm run demo:langchain on push/PR to main, asserts EXECUTED/NULL outcomes, uploads logs as artifacts. Read-only CI, no deploy capability.

intent: Issue #1984: replace singleton GMA with append-only gma_registry.jsonl, selected by (branch, governed_files_hash); add append-only enforcement, merge=union for both governance JSONL registries, spec updates, and fate tests. Bootstrap entry authorizing this PR's own workflow mutations.
